Video.summary: Adventure awaits in the heat of the desert plains.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.7

Video.summary: Between babbling brooks and lazy rivers lives nature's perfect calm.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.12

Video.summary: Adventure awaits in the heat of the desert plains.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.7

Video.summary: Between babbling brooks and lazy rivers lives nature's perfect calm.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.12

Video.summary: A mysterious fever overwhelms Mark as he struggles to fulfil a childhood dream. He must use every ounce of inner strength to journey to the mouth of hell, and make it out alive.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Uphill Battle

Video.summary: Mark & Jaclyn chase extreme winter weather as Nor’easters hammer Atlantic Canada.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Relentless Winter

Video.summary: A mysterious fever overwhelms Mark as he struggles to fulfil a childhood dream. He must use every ounce of inner strength to journey to the mouth of hell, and make it out alive.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Uphill Battle

Video.summary: Mark & Jaclyn chase extreme winter weather as Nor’easters hammer Atlantic Canada.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Relentless Winter

Video.summary: A mysterious fever overwhelms Mark as he struggles to fulfil a childhood dream. He must use every ounce of inner strength to journey to the mouth of hell, and make it out alive.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Uphill Battle

Video.summary: Canada’s weather is complex and powerful! Mark and fellow storm hunters chase down avalanches in British Columbia’s back country, twisters in Saskatchewan, and hurricane scale storms in Newfoundland. Enduring extreme weather is just an ordinary day for the True North Strong.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | True North Strong

Video.summary: From hailstorms to hurricanes and tornadoes, the Storm Hunters revisit their craziest chases and share some of the most amazing moments in extreme weather events.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Best of

Video.summary: Jaclyn joins Mark in a ride through the US Midwest during the most prolific tornado season on record.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury

Video.summary: Another chase through the hotbed of wicked weather puts the storm hunters a little too close to the danger zone. Will Mark & Jaclyn see the tornado they’re hoping for before it’s too late?
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort
Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort
Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort

Video.summary: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core

Video.summary: Jaclyn Whittal and Mark Robinson are in Tornado Alley to track down some of the most ferocious weather.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Knowing the Enemy

Video.summary: A mysterious fever overwhelms Mark as he struggles to fulfil a childhood dream. He must use every ounce of inner strength to journey to the mouth of hell, and make it out alive.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Uphill Battle

Video.summary: On his home turf in Canada, Mark and his team chase one of nature’s deadliest forces, coming face to face with tornadoes’ shear strength.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Shear Strength

Video.summary: Destructive tornadoes and ferocious winds are only two elements Mark and Jaclyn encounter when storm hunting.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Perilous Pursuit

Video.summary: It’s an ordinary town with a history of heartache. No one knows why Moore, Oklahoma has been the target of 3 mega-tornadoes in just 16 years. On the heels of the May 20, 2013 EF5 tornado, Mark & Jaclyn uncover stories behind the disaster, the recovery and the tenacious spirit of the people of the US Midwest.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Heartache & Hope

Video.summary: The North Atlantic Ocean is generous with her bounty, until she takes a life in return. Mark braves the deep seas on the most dangerous day of the lobster fishing season.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Dangerous Waters

Video.summary: Mark joins George and a team of scientists in exploring the world’s largest lava lake - Mount Nyiragongo.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Ultimate Risk

Video.summary: Mark & Jaclyn chase extreme winter weather as Nor’easters hammer Atlantic Canada.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Relentless Winter

Video.summary: On the last day of their chase the storm hunters are shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror

Video.summary: Storm Chaser Jaclyn Whittal anxiously experiences her first Category 4 Tropical Storm.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Landfall!

Video.summary: It’s exhilarating. It’s heart-wrenching. Mark and other storm hunters dive head first into some of the most destructive and deadly hurricanes to hit the US mainland in this millennium.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Monster Hurricanes

Video.summary: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous “Ships of the Desert”. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.
Video.title: Angry Planet | By Camel to Timbuktu

Image.alt: Angry Planet | By Camel to Timbuktu
Angry Planet | By Camel to Timbuktu
Angry Planet | By Camel to Timbuktu

Video.summary: Geoorge explores Java at the heart of the Ring of Fire.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Java - Land of Fire

Image.alt: Angry Planet | Java - Land of Fire
Angry Planet | Java - Land of Fire
Angry Planet | Java - Land of Fire

Video.summary: Possibly the home of the deadly Marberg Ebola virus, Kitum Cave is high on Mt.Elgon straddling the Kenya-Uganda border. The deep, waterfall-shrouded cave has been carved out over millennia by elephants in search of salt. When host george kourounis gets bitten by one of the bats…well, you’ll have to see the show to find out what happens.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Elephant Cave

Video.summary: Costa Rica is a tiny country jammed with diversity and adventure. George explores the volcanoes of Costa Rica with an international team of scientists, rafts down whitewater rivers in full flood, canyoneers down raging waterfalls, and handles some of deadliest snakes this tropical country has to offer.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Costa Rica

Video.summary: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore the frigid Canadian arctic in the depths of winter. The team first uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head north through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Arctic Winter

Video.summary: George and three side-kicks head straight into the “Bearcage”, looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones that Texas and Oklahoma can throw at them. They find it – and their stormchasing vehicles don’t look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Highway to Hail

Video.summary: George's exploration of the undersea world begins on a submarine in Grand Caymon.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Under Pressure

Video.summary: The “Angry Planet” team will be tracking storms through the 2009 Hurricane season, and plan to film george as he heads into a big one.
Video.title: Angry Planet | 2009 Hurricane

Video.summary: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous “Ships of the Desert”. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.
